---
name: Capability Request
about: Request a new capability, integration, or improvement for GoalfyData
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed Capability

Describe the capability, integration, or improvement you would like to see.

## Target Agent / Platform

Which agent or platform is this related to?

- [ ] Claude Code
- [ ] Cursor
- [ ] Codex
- [ ] Manus
- [ ] ChatGPT / Custom GPTs
- [ ] Generic API / CLI
- [ ] Other:

## Dataset or Workflow Context

What kind of data or workflow would this capability support?

Examples:
- Dataset creation
- Governance rules
- Skills / usage guidance
- Relationships between tables
- Scheduled updates
- Dashboard or report updates
- Sharing and permissions
- Agent integration

## Expected Behavior

What should happen when this capability works as expected?

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any alternative solutions or workarounds?

## Additional Context

Add screenshots, examples, links, mockups, or any other context that may help us understand the request.
```
